feedback_text: The login timeout is too short - I get logged out while reviewing transactions
Users prefer biometric login over PIN entry
Add quick balance check widget for home screen
Document upload fails for files larger than 5MB
Verification email takes too long to arrive
Allow users to save progress and resume later
Most users abandon during ID verification step
Cannot save favorite payees for quick access
Application form is too long and repetitive
Unclear what documents are required upfront
Users compare rates on external sites before applying
Add pre-qualification tool to show approval odds
Users want to set multiple goals simultaneously
Add visual progress indicators for each goal
